CustomField.label: Ready For Attorney
CustomField.description: The business signal that a referral is complete and approved to send to the Attorney org. The outbound trigger qualifies a referral only on insert-with-true or a false-to-true change; it is NOT the technical contract guard (AttorneyReferralRequestValidator remains that). It does not represent delivery state — Integration_Transmission__c is the source of truth for that.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Marks the referral for its initial Attorney submission. This field does not represent delivery status and is not a manual-retry control: re-checking it does not resend an already-Failed transmission.
